description: Celebrate the festive season with a dash of humor and fun with this email template, perfect for organizing a jovial Ugly Christmas Sweater Day event. The template is all about the holiday spirit, featuring elements of the Christmas season like reindeer, Santa, and jingle bell sweaters. It's designed to engage your audience in a friendly contest for the most outrageous, ugly sweaters, adding a playful twist to your Christmas party. Whether it's for an office gathering or a casual get-together with friends, this template will help you spread the Xmas cheer in a unique and entertaining way. The template falls under the Events and Christmas categories, making it apt for the holiday season.

designer.description:
I believe in the role of design as a facilitating agent that works in the exchange of experience between people, brands and companies. I am deeply passionate about telling unique stories.

I help brands deliver experiences that become new ways of interaction, participation and engagement between companies and customers.

html_data:
Join us at the

Sweater Contest 2021

 

it's

about

to get

ugly

 
 
 

You know that ugly christmas sweater? The one that has cat hair stuck to the back of it and smells funny? The only thing everyone shares in life is the love of ugly sweaters. Whether this glorious and not so fashioned knitted garment is covered in glitter, has lights embedded in it, or can be seen outside at night.
It's time for it to shine!

 

Join us, eat all you can and
be ugly all you want

 
 

SAT

 
 

DEC

17 th

 

5pm

 
 

124, River Street

Your City, State

RSVP
 

This year's Ugly Sweater Competition achievements

Overall Ugliness

 

Sustainability

Give Back

A variety of baked foods and gently used items will be available for purchase!
100% of the proceeds will be donated to Good Causes Project!

Help support a great cause and come have some fun!
